summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: State
Good
Recovery 64 • Sleep 65 • Strain 62%

Read
Recovery is stronger than recent days, while output has run lighter than usual and the day’s spend remains moderate. With protein largely covered but the energy gap still wide, this window favors controlled resistance work over extra volume, with muscle preservation as the bias.

Strong base, measured ceiling.
